case_title: EDUARDO OSORIO VS. DC AUTOMOTIVE MANAGEMENT INC.,

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSORIO, EDUARDO AS TO DEFENDANT DC AUTOMOTIVE MANAGEMENT INC., A CALIFORNIA SUSPENDED CORPORATION DBA SPECTRUM AUTO BODY, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
